case_title: ELIZABETH LUJAN et al VS. THE GOLDEN 1 CREDIT UNION

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-21-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE GOLDEN 1 CREDIT UNION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUJAN, ELIZABETH SILVA, DIEGO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE GOLDEN 1 CREDIT UNION THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM THAT PLAINTIFFS MAY HAVE AGAINST THE BUSINESS WHERE THE CHARGES WERE INCURRED.
